title.arabic: الدعاء إذا نزل منزلا في سفر أو غيره

translations.en: Stopping or lodging somewhere in travel and otherwise

text.arabic: أَعـوذُ بِكَلِـماتِ اللّهِ التّـامّاتِ مِنْ شَـرِّ ما خَلَـق
text.transliteration: A`ūdhu bikalimāti ‘llāhit-tāmmāti min sharri mā khalaq.

translations.en: I seek refuge in the Perfect Words of Allah from the evil of what He has created.
